name: Asset Browser Tools
summary: Adds focused asset browsing workflows for Unity projects.

summaryI18n.zh: 为 Unity 项目提供聚焦的资产浏览工作流。
summaryI18n.en: Adds focused asset browsing workflows for Unity projects.

author: Locus Test
description: Test plugin entry for the Locus Plugin Hub app-store grid. Uses a Locus icon id and downloads from a separate public test repository.

descriptionI18n.zh: 用于 Locus 插件 Hub 的测试条目，验证中文详情、Locus 图标和独立测试仓库下载链路。
descriptionI18n.en: Test plugin entry for the Locus Plugin Hub app-store grid. Uses a Locus icon id and downloads from a separate public test repository.
